name: Control Ward

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Place a Control Ward that reveals and disables nearby enemy wards and traps.

effects_structured.raw: Place a Control Ward that reveals and disables nearby enemy wards and traps.
Limited to 1 Control Ward placed on the map per player.

simpleDescription: Used to disable wards and invisible traps in an area.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Control Ward is a manually placed utility ward: the player actively places it, then it persistently reveals/disables enemy ward and trap vision interactions until destroyed.
Page-level behavior review confirms per-player map limit (one active Control Ward at a time).

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Control Ward
sources.used_for: page-level verification of ward reveal/disable behavior and map placement limit
